mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quiz_sets WHERE status IN ('DRAFT', 'REVIEWED')
SELECT id AS quiz_set_id, challenge_date, variant_code, status, created_at, published_at FROM quiz_sets WHERE id = #{quizSetId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quiz_sets WHERE challenge_date = #{challengeDate} AND status IN ('DRAFT', 'REVIEWED', 'PUBLISHED')
SELECT variant_code FROM quiz_sets WHERE challenge_date = #{challengeDate} AND status IN ('DRAFT', 'REVIEWED', 'PUBLISHED') ORDER BY variant_code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO quiz_sets (challenge_date, variant_code, status) VALUES (#{challengeDate}, #{variantCode}, 'DRAFT')
INSERT INTO passages (quiz_set_id, position, title, content, topic) VALUES (#{quizSetId}, #{position}, #{title}, #{content}, #{topic})
INSERT INTO questions (passage_id, position, content) VALUES (#{passageId}, #{position}, #{content})
INSERT INTO question_options (question_id, position, content) VALUES (#{questionId}, #{position}, #{content})
INSERT INTO question_keys (question_id, correct_option_id, explanation, evidence) VALUES (#{questionId}, #{correctOptionId}, #{explanation}, #{evidence})
mapper.update: UPDATE quiz_sets SET status = 'PUBLISHED', published_at = #{publishedAt} WHERE id = #{quizSetId} AND status IN ('DRAFT', 'REVIEWED')

UPDATE quiz_sets SET status = 'REVIEWED', ai_provider = #{aiProvider}, ai_model = #{aiModel}, prompt_version = #{promptVersion}, generation_prompt_id = #{generationPromptId}, validation_prompt_id = #{validationPromptId} WHERE id = #{quizSetId} AND status = 'DRAFT'
UPDATE quiz_sets SET challenge_date = #{challengeDate}, variant_code = #{variantCode}, status = 'DRAFT' WHERE id = #{quizSetId} AND status IN ('DRAFT', 'REVIEWED')

WITH reusable AS ( SELECT qs.id FROM quiz_sets qs WHERE qs.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND qs.challenge_date < #{currentDate} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_quiz_assignments assignment WHERE assignment.quiz_set_id = qs.id ) ORDER BY qs.challenge_date, qs.id FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED LIMIT 1 ) UPDATE quiz_sets qs SET challenge_date = #{targetDate}, variant_code = #{variantCode} FROM reusable WHERE qs.id = reusable.id

UPDATE generation_logs SET status = 'INVALIDATED', error_message = 'The reviewed quiz was edited or deleted by an administrator.', completed_at = COALESCE(completed_at, #{updatedAt}), updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE quiz_set_id = #{quizSetId} AND status IN ('READY', 'PUBLISHED')
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM quiz_sets WHERE id = #{quizSetId} AND status IN ('DRAFT', 'REVIEWED')
